subject: Gaming
title: Virtual Reality Finally Arrives
description: Learn Virtual Reality Finally Arrives in one minute.

hook.text: VR promised total immersion since the 1990s. After decades of failure, it finally started working.

buildup.text: The Oculus Rift Kickstarter in 2012 reignited VR dreams. Facebook bought Oculus for $2 billion.

discovery.text: Half-Life: Alyx in 2020 proved VR could deliver a full AAA gaming experience, not just short demos.

twist.text: Motion sickness remained a barrier. Many players couldn't use VR for more than 30 minutes.

climax.text: Meta's Quest headsets brought standalone VR mainstream. Over 20 million Quest 2 units were sold.

punchline.text: Decades of broken promises. VR delivered—one headset at a time.

quiz.question: What game proved VR could deliver a full AAA experience?
